steps.t: Lhanuch lies to the south-east of Echad Idhrenfair, in Nan Laeglin. Himeinior has asked you to seek entry into the Uch-lûth village of Lhanuch.
The guard is at the entrance to the Brenin's Hall of Lhanuch. The guard at the village gate instructed you to speak with the guard before the Brenin's…
